productDisplayName: Levis Men Trainer Liner Flat Knit Pack of 3 Socks
description: Set of three Levi's socks With a supportive ankle Fit and crafted from soft cotton, these ankle socks from Levi's make for a great buy. And what better way to enhance your comfort level three-fold than with this tri-pack of socks in black, navy and white! Made of soft cotton for a secure fit and exemplary comfort Spandex in welt for enhanced grip Arch support for good grip and a customised fit Cushioned footbed for absolute shock absorption and enhanced comfort Breathable mesh sole Softly elasticated broad ankle welt to ensure a soft grip Brand name printed on the welt Sock care Machine wash in warm water using a mild detergent Use non-chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low in a delicate cycle Do not iron
